issue.message: A backup `<pin>` declaration is highly recommended
When scheduling exact alarms, apps should explicitly call `AlarmManager#canScheduleExactAlarms` or handle `SecurityException`s

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html
Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="insights_estimation_method">Based on last %1$d days net-balance linear regression</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("days"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("total"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("Fired"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("records"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("missed"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("entries"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("entries"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("accounts"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("account"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("summaries"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("records"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("account"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="alert_group_content">%1$d account(s) low balance, %2$d account(s) changed</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("accounts"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("times"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="service_killed_message">Killed by system %1$d times. OnePlus/ColorOS may freeze the app in background.</string>

issue.message: The attribute `android:allowBackup` is deprecated from Android 12 and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is never < 35
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 35
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 35
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 35
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 35
Unnecessary; SDK_INT is always >= 35
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableFloatStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `#F0F2FF` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.DeepSeekBalance`)

Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
issue.errorLine1: private val dateFmt = SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss.SSS", Locale.getDefault())

issue.message: Assigning `Locale.getDefault()` to a final static field is suspicious; this code will not work correctly if the user changes locale while the app is running
